message:
🌱 Add argo-workflows: Allow setting workflow parameter values using ConfigMap mission (#762)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,81 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "argo-workflows-3212-allow-setting-workflow-parameter-values-using-configmap",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "argo-workflows: Allow setting workflow parameter values using ConfigMap",
+    "description": "Allow setting workflow parameter values using ConfigMap. Requested by 32+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current argo-workflows deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your argo-workflows version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n argo-workflows -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-workflows\nhelm list -n argo-workflows 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working argo-workflows installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review argo-workflows configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant argo-workflows configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n argo-workflows -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-workflows\nkubectl get configmap -n argo-workflows -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=argo-workflows\n```\nThere is currently no way to set a workflow parameter value (for both global `spec.arguments.parameters` and `steps[].arguments.parameters`) using the `valueFrom.configMapKeyRef` construct in the same way `env` variables can be defined."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Allow setting workflow parameter values using ConfigMap",
+        "description": "Use a resource template to read ConfigMap values and pass them as workflow parameters. The `valueFrom` field only works for output parameters, so use a two-step approach:\n```yaml\napiVersion: v1\nkind: ConfigMap\nmetadata:\n  name: environment-config\n  namespace: worker\ndata:\n  docker.registry: '123456789012.dkr.ecr.us-west-1.amazonaws.com'\n```\nThen use a `resource` template to get the value and pass it as an output parameter to subsequent steps."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n argo-workflows -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-workflows\nkubectl get events -n argo-workflows --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Allow setting workflow parameter values using ConfigMap\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Use a resource template with action: get to read ConfigMap values at runtime and pass them as output parameters to subsequent steps. Direct valueFrom.configMapKeyRef is not supported for workflow argument parameters.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "apiVersion: v1\nkind: ConfigMap\nmetadata:\n  name: environment-config\n  namespace: worker\ndata:\n  docker.registry: '123456789012.dkr.ecr.us-west-1.amazonaws.com'",
+        "apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1\nkind: Workflow\nmetadata:\n  generateName: myworkflow-\nspec:\n  entrypoint: step1\n  arguments:\n    parameters:\n    - name: registry\n      valueFrom:\n        configMapKeyRef:\n          name: environment-config\n          key: docker.registry\n  templates:\n  - name: step1\n    container:\n      image: '{{workflow.parameters.registry}}/step1:latest'\n      command: [./start.sh]",
+        "apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1\nkind: Workflow\nmetadata:\n  generateName: get-cm-value-\nspec:\n  entrypoint: entry\n\n  templates:\n    - name: entry\n      steps:\n        - - name: get-cm-value\n            template: get-cm-value\n        - - name: use-cm-value\n            template: use-cm-value\n            arguments:\n              parameters:\n                - name: docker-val\n                  value: \"{{steps.get-cm-value.outputs.parameters.docker-val}}\"\n\n    - name: get-cm-value\n      resource:\n        action: get\n        manifest: |\n          apiVersion: v1\n          kind: ConfigMap\n          metadata:\n            name: environment-config\n      outputs:\n        parameters:\n          - name: docker-val\n            valueFrom:\n              jsonPath: '{.data.docker\\.registry}'"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "argo-workflows",
+      "graduated",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "argo-workflows"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Configmap",
+      "Namespace"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/argoproj/argo-workflows/issues/3212",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/argoproj/argo-workflows",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/argoproj/argo-workflows/pull/4427"
+    },
+    "reactions": 32,
+    "comments": 16,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl",
+      "argo"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with argo-workflows installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-12T06:20:15.480Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
